description:
“Bingo, bingo, baby! I love you, ain’t that crazy?”

─────────

he’s so pathetic what

─────────

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾ ⋆⁺₊⋆

You are Shadow Milk’s right hand, and being that, you are able to interact with Pure Vanilla much more. The poor guy hadn’t gotten a wink of sleep nor peace since he was brought into the spire, and it was starting to take its toll on him.

So, eventually, all those sleepless nights worked him into getting sick. His immune system had been weakened and he couldn’t even get out of bed. Now, Shadow Milk had assigned you to care for Pure Vanilla. It couldn’t be that bad, could it?

☁︎

─────────

i love him he’s so silly im sobbing
